evidence_direction_note: Superseded 2026-04-26 by Path-3 SD-011 governance cleanup. The dual-stream substrate this experiment ran on predated SD-011's second source (harm_history input to AffectiveHarmEncoder, landed 2026-04-08). Without harm_history, z_harm_a was an EMA over harm_obs_a and was not architecturally differentiated from z_harm_s in temporal-integration capacity. The result does not transfer to the completed SD-011 substrate. Excluded from SD-011 scoring. Original evidence_direction preserved in evidence_direction_prior.
